lessons.name: Unit 10: Communication in the Future
lessons.description: Learn about future communication with prepositions and possessive pronouns.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Communication methods: video call, hologram, telepathy, social media, email, text message, voice message, video conference

Technology: smartphone, tablet, smartwatch, virtual reality, augmented reality, artificial intelligence, robot, device

Actions: communicate, connect, contact, send, receive, share, post, chat, message, call

sections.heading: 2-12. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Luyện tập từ vựng, Ngữ âm, Ngữ pháp, Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
A. Prepositions of Place and Time

1. Prepositions of Place:

  • in: trong (không gian kín) - in the room, in Vietnam
  • on: trên (bề mặt) - on the table, on the wall
  • at: tại (điểm cụ thể) - at home, at school, at the station

2. Prepositions of Time:

  • in: trong (tháng, năm, thế kỷ, buổi) - in May, in 2024, in the morning
  • on: vào (ngày, thứ, ngày tháng) - on Monday, on May 1st
  • at: vào (giờ, thời điểm) - at 8 o'clock, at night, at noon

B. Possessive Pronouns

Bảng đại từ sở hữu:

  • my → mine
  • your → yours
  • his → his
  • her → hers
  • our → ours
  • their → theirs

Cách dùng:

  • Thay thế tính từ sở hữu + danh từ
  • Ex: This is my phone. That phone is yours.
  • Ex: My phone is new, but hers is old.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Prepositions of Place
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • in: không gian kín
  • on: bề mặt
  • at: điểm cụ thể

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Prepositions of Time
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • in: tháng, năm, buổi
  • on: ngày, thứ
  • at: giờ, thời điểm

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Possessive Pronouns
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định chủ sở hữu
  • Chọn đại từ sở hữu phù hợp
  • mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs

examples.question: This is my phone. That phone is ______. (you)
My phone is new, but ______ is old. (she)
examples.solution: My phone is new, but hers is old.

examples.question: Our house is big, but ______ is small. (they)
examples.solution: Our house is big, but theirs is small.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp Prepositions và Pronouns
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định loại giới từ cần dùng
  • Xác định đại từ sở hữu
  • Kết hợp trong câu

examples.question: I'll meet you ______ the station. My car is red, ______ is blue. (your)
examples.solution: I'll meet you at the station. My car is red, yours is blue.

examples.question: The meeting is ______ 3 p.m. ______ Monday. This is my plan, where is ______? (your)
examples.solution: The meeting is at 3 p.m. on Monday. This is my plan, where is yours?

examples.question: I live ______ Hanoi. My house is small, but ______ is big. (their)
examples.solution: I live in Hanoi. My house is small, but theirs is big.

exercises.question: I live ______ Vietnam.
The book is ______ the table.
I was born ______ May.
The meeting is ______ Monday.
I wake up ______ 6 o'clock.
This is my phone. That phone is ______.
My phone is new, but ______ is old.
I'm ______ home.
Our house is big, but ______ is small.
The picture is ______ the wall.
Which prepositions are used for TIME? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: in the morning, on Monday, at 6 o'clock là giới từ chỉ thời gian. 'on the table' là giới từ chỉ địa điểm.

exercises.question: Which are possessive pronouns? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: mine và yours là đại từ sở hữu. my và your là tính từ sở hữu.

exercises.question: Which sentences use prepositions correctly? (Select all that apply)
options: The book is at the table.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: in Hanoi, on Monday. Sai: at 6 o'clock (không phải in), on the table (không phải at).

exercises.question: Fill in: I live ______ Vietnam. I was born ______ 2010.
Fill in: The meeting is ______ Monday ______ 3 p.m.
Replace with possessive pronoun: This is my phone. That is your phone. → This is ______, that is ______.
exercises.explanation: my phone → mine; your phone → yours

exercises.question: Fill in: My car is red. ______ (her car) is blue.
Rearrange: in / I / live / Hanoi / . / was / I / born / in / 2010 / .
exercises.sample_answer: I live in Hanoi. I was born in 2010.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: S + V + in + địa điểm. S + was born + in + năm.

exercises.question: Rearrange: meeting / The / is / on / Monday / at / 3 p.m. / .
exercises.sample_answer: The meeting is on Monday at 3 p.m.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: S + is + on + thứ + at + giờ.

exercises.question: Transform: This is my phone. That is your phone. (Use possessive pronouns)
exercises.sample_answer: This is mine. That is yours. / This phone is mine. That phone is yours.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: my phone → mine; your phone → yours

exercises.question: Transform: My house is big. Their house is small. (Use possessive pronouns)
exercises.sample_answer: My house is big, but theirs is small. / Mine is big, but theirs is small.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: their house → theirs; my house → mine

exercises.question: Rearrange and transform: book / The / is / the / on / table / . / This / my / is / book / . / That / your / is / book / . (Use possessive pronouns in the last two sentences)
exercises.sample_answer: The book is on the table. This is mine. That is yours.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp câu 1: The book is on the table. Biến đổi câu 2-3: my book → mine, your phone → yours
